presets.title: General Answer Quality
presets.purpose: Score one or more assistant answers for everyday quality, usefulness, and clarity.

defaultCriteria.label: Clarity
defaultCriteria.description: The answer is easy to understand and well organized.

defaultCriteria.label: Correctness
defaultCriteria.description: The answer appears accurate for the task and avoids misleading claims.

defaultCriteria.label: Completeness
defaultCriteria.description: The answer covers the important parts of the prompt.

defaultCriteria.label: Usefulness
defaultCriteria.description: The answer gives practical, actionable value to the user.

defaultValidators.description: Check for empty or extremely short/long answers before LLM judging.

inputExpectations.notes: Works for single-answer quality or multi-answer comparison later; current runtime integration is not implemented.

outputShape.notes: Expected to produce per-subject scores and a short verdict.

presets.title: Research Quality
presets.purpose: Evaluate depth, grounding, coverage, synthesis, and uncertainty handling in research outputs.

defaultCriteria.label: Coverage
defaultCriteria.description: The research covers the important aspects of the task.

defaultCriteria.label: Source Quality
defaultCriteria.description: Sources are relevant, credible, and appropriate to the claim.

defaultCriteria.label: Factuality
defaultCriteria.description: Claims are consistent with the cited or supplied evidence.

defaultCriteria.label: Synthesis
defaultCriteria.description: The output integrates findings instead of listing disconnected facts.

defaultCriteria.label: Uncertainty
defaultCriteria.description: The output notes ambiguity, limits, and confidence appropriately.

defaultValidators.description: Check whether the research output includes source or citation markers.

inputExpectations.notes: Designed for research reports and comparative research outputs.

outputShape.notes: Expected to call out missing coverage and weakly supported claims.

presets.title: JSON Contract Check
presets.purpose: Validate structured JSON output against an expected contract and prompt intent.

defaultCriteria.label: Valid JSON
defaultCriteria.description: The output can be parsed as JSON without repair.

defaultCriteria.label: Contract Adherence
defaultCriteria.description: The JSON includes expected keys, types, and allowed values.

defaultCriteria.label: Semantic Fit
defaultCriteria.description: The JSON values satisfy the user's intent, not only the surface shape.

defaultValidators.description: Parse output as JSON before any LLM critique.
Check required top-level keys when supplied by the user or future UI.
Check enumerated values when supplied by the user or future UI.

inputExpectations.notes: Runtime JSON validators are not implemented in this workpack.

outputShape.notes: Expected to separate deterministic parse/contract results from LLM critique.

presets.title: Prompt Adherence
presets.purpose: Check whether an output followed the user's original prompt, format, and constraints.

defaultCriteria.label: Constraint Coverage
defaultCriteria.description: The output satisfies explicit instructions and constraints from the prompt.

defaultCriteria.label: Format Adherence
defaultCriteria.description: The output follows requested structure, style, and format.

defaultCriteria.label: Omission Control
defaultCriteria.description: The output does not omit important requested elements.

defaultValidators.description: Check declarative prompt constraints when future UI supplies them.

inputExpectations.notes: Best when the original prompt and constraints are available.

outputShape.notes: Expected to identify followed and missed instructions.

presets.title: Factuality / Grounding
presets.purpose: Evaluate whether claims are supported by supplied sources, citations, or context.

defaultCriteria.label: Supported Claims
defaultCriteria.description: Important claims are backed by supplied evidence or cited sources.

defaultCriteria.label: Unsupported Claims
defaultCriteria.description: The output avoids unsupported or overconfident statements.

defaultCriteria.label: Contradictions
defaultCriteria.description: The output does not contradict the supplied context.

defaultValidators.description: Check whether citations or evidence markers are present when expected.

inputExpectations.notes: Useful when the evaluation has source text, citations, or browsing evidence.

outputShape.notes: Expected to flag unsupported claims and contradictions.

presets.title: Code Review
presets.purpose: Review technical answers or code snippets for correctness, maintainability, risk, and tests.

defaultCriteria.label: Technical Correctness
defaultCriteria.description: The answer or code is technically sound for the stated problem.

defaultCriteria.label: Edge Cases
defaultCriteria.description: The answer accounts for important edge cases and failure paths.

defaultCriteria.label: Maintainability
defaultCriteria.description: The solution is understandable and reasonably maintainable.

defaultCriteria.label: Testability
defaultCriteria.description: The answer includes or enables appropriate verification.

defaultValidators.description: Check that the reviewed output is not empty or too large for a normal judge pass.

inputExpectations.notes: Designed for technical explanations, code snippets, and implementation plans.

outputShape.notes: Expected to prioritize bugs, missing edge cases, and verification gaps.

presets.title: Security Review
presets.purpose: Identify risky advice, secret exposure, injection risk, and unsafe privilege or boundary assumptions.

defaultCriteria.label: Secret Safety
defaultCriteria.description: The output avoids exposing or encouraging exposure of tokens, passwords, or secrets.

defaultCriteria.label: Injection Resistance
defaultCriteria.description: The output accounts for prompt, command, HTML, SQL, or similar injection risk where relevant.

defaultCriteria.label: Boundary Safety
defaultCriteria.description: The answer respects permission, sandbox, IPC, filesystem, and network boundaries.

defaultCriteria.label: Risk Disclosure
defaultCriteria.description: The output explains material security tradeoffs and failure paths.

defaultValidators.description: Check for token, API key, password, and secret-like strings.

inputExpectations.notes: Designed to complement, not replace, dedicated security review.

outputShape.notes: Expected to report risks with severity and mitigation suggestions.

presets.title: UX / Product Review
presets.purpose: Critique product, UX, or design output for user fit, clarity, workflow, and tradeoffs.

defaultCriteria.label: User Fit
defaultCriteria.description: The output fits the target user, domain, and job-to-be-done.

defaultCriteria.label: Workflow Clarity
defaultCriteria.description: The proposed experience is easy to scan, navigate, and repeat.

defaultCriteria.label: Accessibility
defaultCriteria.description: The output considers accessible text, controls, states, and interaction patterns.

defaultCriteria.label: Tradeoffs
defaultCriteria.description: The output surfaces relevant product tradeoffs and constraints.

defaultValidators.description: Check that critique inputs are large enough to evaluate and not excessive.

inputExpectations.notes: Works for design specs, UX critiques, product plans, and generated UI descriptions.

outputShape.notes: Expected to give actionable critique rather than marketing-style praise.

presets.title: Summarization Quality
presets.purpose: Evaluate whether a summary is faithful, concise, readable, and covers the source.

defaultCriteria.label: Faithfulness
defaultCriteria.description: The summary does not introduce unsupported claims.

defaultCriteria.label: Coverage
defaultCriteria.description: The summary preserves the most important source points.

defaultCriteria.label: Compression
defaultCriteria.description: The summary is appropriately shorter without losing essential meaning.

defaultCriteria.label: Readability
defaultCriteria.description: The summary is easy to read and organized for the intended use.

defaultValidators.description: Check source-to-summary length ratio when both are available.

inputExpectations.notes: Best when source text and generated summary are both provided.

outputShape.notes: Expected to separate omissions from hallucinated or unsupported additions.

presets.title: Custom User Rubric
presets.purpose: Let the user supply their own rubric and criteria for one-off or domain-specific evaluation.

defaultCriteria.label: Rubric Fit
defaultCriteria.description: The evaluation follows the user's supplied rubric and prioritization.

defaultValidators.description: Check that the custom rubric and evaluated content are present.

inputExpectations.notes: Allows user-defined criteria; current runtime custom rubric support remains separate from this catalog.

outputShape.notes: Expected to mirror the user's rubric where future prompt assembly supports it.
